title: No Friends没有朋友整合包
description: A modpack playable with or without friends, featuring a wide variety of mods from different genres.
body:
English:

QQ Group: 2151045360  

Server files have been released: https://www.minebbs.com/resources/1-21-fabric-serverbeta1-0.9535/  

Even without friends, you can enjoy solo play.  

The difference between "lite" and standard versions:  
- Lite version uses ItemPhysicLite (dropped items do not float on water, better optimization)  
- Standard version uses ItemPhysic (requires a more powerful CPU)  
Server clients should use v.forfcl  

**Known bugs**:  
- Server crashes upon exit  
- After stopping the server via `/stop`, it may not terminate automatically and needs to be manually closed  

**Update highlights**:  
- Fabric updated to 0.16.10  
- Added Supplementaries, ItemPhysic (lite), CreativeCore, Modernfix  
- Note: Fabric update requires world migration  

**System requirements**:  
- Very low specs: 3G-4G RAM sufficient, fps >60  
- Features industry, magic, power generation, and exploration systems - highly replayable

Chinese:

QQ群：2151045360

服务端已发, https://www.minebbs.com/resources/1-21-fabric-serverbeta1-0.9535/

即使没有朋友，也可以自娱自乐

lite和正常版区别在于lite版使用itemphysiclite（掉落物不会漂浮在水面，优化好），普通版使用itemphysic（需要更强劲的CPU）
服务器客户端请使用v.forfcl


已知bug：退出服务器会崩溃，服务端stop后检测不到需要手动结束

更新内容：
Fabric更新至0.16.10
增加了Supplementaries，ItemPhysic（lite），CreativeCore，Modernfix
增加了 Supplementaries，ItemPhysic（lite），CreativeCore，Modernfix
注意：更新Fabric需迁移存档


非常低配，3G-4G即可,fps>60
工业，魔法，发电，探险一应俱全，很耐玩
